calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-18-2016 Vacated

Notice Of Deft Rodney Cella'S Motoin For Order Compelling Joinder Of Indispensable Parties, Or In The Alternative, Dismissal Of Action
Off Calendar Nov-03-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Jacqueline Ravenscroft, Esq., (415)504-2165 for Plaintif/Opposing party Mary Hatch.
Ron Kunski, Esq., (415)426-3525 for Defendant/Moving party Rodney Cella.

Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral arguments adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT RODNEY CELLA Notice Of Defendant Rodney Cella'S Motion For Order Compelling Joinder Of Indispensable Parties, Or In The Alternative, Dismissal Of Action is DENIED. As joinder is not feasible, defendant's motion for order compelling joinder of indispensable parties is DENIED. The trial court can address issues of what damages plaintiff may seek. Orders signed in open court. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

Notice Of Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Oct-14-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant's Motion for Judgment on the Pleadings is OFF CALENDAR per request of the moving party. Judge: A. James Robertson II, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-09-2015 Set For Trial On Apr-11-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
